eval 'echo WP_PLUGIN_DIR . "\n"; $file = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . "/site-tools-status/site-tools-status.php"; var_dump(file_exists($file)); if (file_exists($file)) { echo file_get_contents($file); }'

eval 'echo WP_PLUGIN_DIR . "\n"; $file = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . "/site-tools-status/site-tools-status.php"; var_dump(file_exists($file)); if (file_exists($file)) { echo "---FILE---\n"; echo file_get_contents($file); }'

eval '$file = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . "/site-tools-status/site-tools-status.php"; echo "FILE=$file
"; echo file_exists($file) ? "EXISTS
" : "MISSING
"; if (file_exists($file)) { echo "---
"; echo file_get_contents($file); }'

eval '$file = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . "/site-tools-status/site-tools-status.php"; echo "FILE=$file
"; echo file_exists($file) ? "EXISTS
" : "MISSING
"; if (file_exists($file)) { echo "---START---
"; echo file_get_contents($file); echo "
---END---
"; }'

eval '$file = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . "/site-tools-status/site-tools-status.php"; echo "Path: $file
"; echo file_exists( $file ) ? "exists
" : "missing
"; if ( file_exists( $file ) ) { echo substr( file_get_contents( $file ), 0, 500 ); }'

arguments_redacted.content:
<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Site Tools Status Endpoint
 * Description: Adds a public read-only REST API endpoint at /wp-json/site-tools/v1/status for simple uptime and dashboard integrations.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Site Tools
 * License: GPL-2.0-or-later
 * Text Domain: site-tools-status
 */

defined( 'ABSPATH' ) || exit;

/**
 * Register the public status endpoint.
 */
function site_tools_status_register_rest_route() {
	register_rest_route(
		'site-tools/v1',
		'/status',
		array(
			'methods'             => WP_REST_Server::READABLE,
			'callback'            => 'site_tools_status_get_status',
			'permission_callback' => '__return_true',
		)
	);
}
add_action( 'rest_api_init', 'site_tools_status_register_rest_route' );

/**
 * Return a compact, public-safe site status payload.
 *
 * @return WP_REST_Response
 */
function site_tools_status_get_status() {
	$counts = wp_count_posts( 'post' );

	return rest_ensure_response(
		array(
			'ok'              => true,
			'name'            => get_bloginfo( 'name' ),
			'published_posts' => isset( $counts->publish ) ? (int) $counts->publish : 0,
		)
	);
}

<?php

 * Plugin Name: Site Tools Status Endpoint

 * Version: 1.0.0

 * Text Domain: site-tools-status
 */

defined( 'ABSPATH' ) || exit;

	register_rest_route(
		'site-tools/v1',
		'/status',
		array(
			'methods'             => WP_REST_Server::READABLE,
			'callback'            => 'site_tools_status_get_status',
			'permission_callback' => '__return_true',
		)
	);
}
add_action( 'rest_api_init', 'site_tools_status_register_rest_route' );

/**
 * Return a compact, public-safe site status payload.
 *
 * @return WP_REST_Response
 */
function site_tools_status_get_status() {
	$counts = wp_count_posts( 'post' );

	return rest_ensure_response(
		array(
			'ok'              => true,
			'name'            => get_bloginfo( 'name' ),
			'published_posts' => isset( $counts->publish ) ? (int) $counts->publish : 0,
		)
	);
}
